input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.4.1
            TITLE: conversion factors

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.4.1: Conversion Factors
D.13.4.1 Conversion Factors 
Each fuel or energy used is converted using the factors: 
a. Gasoline / Petrol  2.31 kg of CO2 per liter 
b. E85     1.65 kg of CO2 per liter 
c. Electric     0.65 kg of CO2 per kWh

final_answer: rule D.13.4.1: Conversion Factors D.13.4.1 Conversion Factors Each fuel or energy used is converted using the factors: a. Gasoline / Petrol 2.31 kg of CO2 per liter b. E85 1.65 kg of CO2 per liter c. Electric 0.65 kg of CO2 per kWh
